questions.prompt: Gate valve used in drainage work having a 102 mm diameter or larger shall have bodies
questions.explanation_short: Valves up to and including 51 mm in size shall be brass or other approved materials. Sizes over
questions.explanation_long: Valves up to and including 51 mm in size shall be brass or other approved materials. Sizes over Cc. B ronze 51mm may have cast iron or brass Bodies! Each gate valve shall be a fullway type with working parts of non-corrosive materials. Section 605 — VALVES Section 1410 — VALVES AND FIITINGS Gate valves, when used in drainage work, shall be the fullway type with working parts of corrosion resistant metal. Sizes 102 mm or larger in diameter shall have cast iron bodies, and sizes less than 102 mm shall have cast brass or bronze bodies. Valves up to and including 51 mm in size shall be all brass or bronze metal. RNPCP, Chapter 14
